title: Search for the Lightning Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A wild baby Lightning Dragon is on the loose, and a new Dragon Master must step up! ⚡

q.en: Who is the new Dragon Master chosen by the Dragon Stone in this book?
q.zh: 本书中，被龙石选中的新驯龙师是谁？

options.en: A boy named Carlos who lives by the sea with his grandmother
options.zh: 和祖母住在海边的男孩卡洛斯

options.en: King Roland's son
A girl named Mina from the Far North according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 来自极北之地的女孩米娜（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The wizard Diego

explain.en: The Dragon Stone lit up and showed a boy named Carlos walking the rocky shore with his grandmother (Abuela Nita) in the Land of Aragon. He is the Lightning Dragon's new Dragon Master.
explain.zh: 龙石亮起，画面里是男孩卡洛斯和祖母（阿韦拉妮塔）在阿贡之国的岩石海岸上走着。他就是闪电龙的新驯龙师。

q.en: Why does Carlos first refuse to believe Drake and Diego?
q.zh: 卡洛斯一开始为什么不肯相信德雷克和迪亚哥？

options.en: He already has a dragon of his own according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他自己已经有一条龙了（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He is sleeping and dreaming
He is afraid of wizards
He thinks dragons aren't real and they are just storytellers
options.zh: 他觉得龙根本不存在，他们只是说故事的人

explain.en: Carlos folds his arms and says, 'Dragons aren't real,' calling Diego a storyteller. He only believes them after Drake calls Worm through the Dragon Stone and the dragon appears behind the cottage.
explain.zh: 卡洛斯抱着手说“龙不是真的”，还说迪亚哥是说故事的人。直到德雷克用龙石召唤虫虫、龙出现在小屋后面，他才相信。

q.en: What are the strings of seashells hanging in Diego's cottage for?
q.zh: 迪亚哥小屋里挂着的海螺串是用来做什么的？

options.en: They are decorations for a party according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它们是派对上的装饰（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: They are a magical alarm that rattles when danger is near
options.zh: 它们是魔法警报，危险靠近时会发出咯咯声

options.en: They keep the cottage warm
They feed the dragons

explain.en: Diego explains the shells work like a magical alarm: they rattle and clink when danger is near. They shake when Eko later attacks, warning everyone.
explain.zh: 迪亚哥说海螺串像魔法警报：危险靠近时就会摇动作响。后来埃科来袭时它们果然震动，提醒大家。

q.en: How do Drake and Diego find Carlos in the busy fishing village?
q.zh: 德雷克和迪亚哥是怎样在繁忙的渔村找到卡洛斯的？

options.en: Diego's gull, Bob, flies off and finds him
options.zh: 迪亚哥的海鸥波波飞出去找到了他

options.en: They use a fishing net
Griffith's gazing ball shows a map according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 格里菲斯的窥视球显示了一张地图（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: They ask the villagers one by one

explain.en: Diego can talk to birds. He whistles to his gull Bob, who flies off and comes back to lead them to Carlos in the village by the sea.
explain.zh: 迪亚哥能和鸟儿说话。他朝海鸥波波吹哨，波波飞出去后回来带他们找到了海边的卡洛斯。

q.en: What finally convinces Carlos that dragons are real?
q.zh: 是什么最终让卡洛斯相信龙是真的？

options.en: His grandmother's story
A thunderstorm outside
A picture in Diego's book according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 迪亚哥书里的一张图（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Drake calls Worm through his Dragon Stone and the dragon appears
options.zh: 德雷克用龙石召唤虫虫，龙真的出现了

explain.en: Drake closes his eyes, touches his Dragon Stone, and asks Worm to find him. Worm appears behind the cottage, and Carlos touches his neck and says, 'It's all real.'
explain.zh: 德雷克闭上眼、摸着龙石，请虫虫来找他。虫虫出现在小屋后面，卡洛斯摸着他的脖子说“这一切都是真的”。

q.en: Why can't Carlos leave with the Dragon Masters at first?
q.zh: 卡洛斯起初为什么不能跟驯龙师们一起走？

options.en: He must stay to care for his grandmother, his only family
options.zh: 他必须留下照顾祖母，那是他唯一的家人

options.en: He does not like dragons
The king will not let him go according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 国王不让他走（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: He is too sick to travel

explain.en: Carlos says his grandmother is his only family and asks who will fetch water and wood for her. He does not want to leave her alone.
explain.zh: 卡洛斯说祖母是他唯一的家人，并问谁来帮她打水、捡柴。他不想把祖母独自留下。

q.en: How does Worm help catch the baby Lightning Dragon?
q.zh: 虫虫是怎样帮忙抓住小闪电龙的？

options.en: He sings a lullaby
As an Earth Dragon, he absorbs the lightning and drains the dragon's energy
options.zh: 作为地龙，他吸收闪电、耗尽小龙的能量

options.en: He builds a cage of stone
He flies the dragon back to the castle according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他飞着把小龙带回城堡（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Worm races under the Lightning Dragon and lets the lightning bolts zap him. The bolts don't shock him — his earth power absorbs them, draining the baby dragon's energy so Diego's bubble can hold him.
explain.zh: 虫虫冲到闪电龙下方，让闪电劈在自己身上。闪电伤不到他——他的地之力量吸收了能量，耗尽了小龙的力气，迪亚哥的魔法泡才罩得住他。

q.en: What name does Carlos give his Lightning Dragon?
q.zh: 卡洛斯给他的闪电龙起了什么名字？

options.en: Neru
Wati
Lalo
Bolt

explain.en: When Carlos sees the sleeping baby dragon, Ana and Bo suggest he name him. He chooses 'Lalo,' and the dragon's Dragon Stone glows faintly, showing a happy feeling.
explain.zh: 卡洛斯看到熟睡的小龙，安娜和博建议他起名。他选了“拉洛”，小龙的龙石微微发光，流露出开心的感觉。

q.en: What does the Dragon Stone let a Dragon Master do?
q.zh: 龙石让驯龙师能够做什么？

options.en: Fly without a dragon according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 不用龙也能飞（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Speak every language
Connect with and hear their dragon's thoughts and feelings
options.zh: 与自己的龙连结，听见龙的想法和感受

options.en: Turn invisible

explain.en: Each Dragon Master wears a piece of the Dragon Stone. It connects them to their dragon so they can hear the dragon's voice in their head and feel its emotions, like when Carlos hears Lalo crying for help.
explain.zh: 每位驯龙师都戴着一块龙石。它把驯龙师和龙连结起来，让他们能在脑中听见龙的声音、感受情绪，比如卡洛斯听到拉洛求救时的情景。

q.en: Who steals Lalo at the end of the book, and how does she escape?
q.zh: 本书结尾是谁偷走了拉洛？她又是怎么逃走的？

options.en: A fisherman in a boat
Eko, a rogue Dragon Master on a Thunder Dragon, escapes through a hole in the sky
options.zh: 叛逃驯龙师埃科骑着雷龙，从一个天空中的洞逃走

options.en: Griffith, using a magic key according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 格里菲斯，用魔法钥匙（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: King Roland, riding Vulcan

explain.en: Eko rides her Thunder Dragon Neru and uses a purple light whip to grab Lalo. A hole of purple swirling energy opens in the sky, and she flies through it, vanishing with the baby dragon.
explain.zh: 埃科骑着雷龙内鲁，用紫色光鞭卷走拉洛。天空中裂开一个紫色旋涡能量的洞，她带着小龙飞进去消失了。
